abstract: End-to-end design-to-code pipeline orchestrating 6 phases: Brief (requirements gathering), Direction (aesthetic + visual identity via aesthetic-direction), Research (competitor analysis via brand-research), System (design tokens + Tailwind config via design-system-generator), Structure (layout selection via bento-layout + component population via component-patterns), and Build (production code generation). Supports React+Tailwind, Astro+Tailwind, Next.js+Tailwind, and vanilla HTML+CSS. Output: complete frontend scaffold with design system integrated, responsive at all breakpoints, fonts configured, components structured, and ready for content/customization.
